title: The moon
wikitext:
[]: The moon(spoilers)             Quote Post by honsou » Mon Jan 21, 2008 5:50 pm I just finished watching the first movie and i had a thought. What in the blue hell is that giant red(blood?) stain on the moon? Anyone have any thoughts on that?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 21, 2008 5:54 pm It's a result of Second Impact when a giant Angel exploded, sending a streak across the moon and turning most of the Earth's water red. Not much more than that is known.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jan 21, 2008 5:59 pm You don't know anything about that.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 21, 2008 5:59 pm There's also the ZOMG REBUILD IS A SEQUEL theory , which originated with the first audience impressions of the movie . But I like NAveryW's suggestion better.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 21, 2008 6:01 pm Jinroh wrote: You don't know anything about that.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Mon Jan 21, 2008 6:24 pm NAveryW wrote: It's a result of Second Impact when a giant Angel exploded, sending a streak across the moon and turning most of the Earth's water red. Not much more than that is known.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jan 21, 2008 6:34 pm honsou wrote: Ah thats interesting, but would the streak make it all the way to the moon?
